plan.failureSummary: The test failed because it attempted to interact with a 'Select your occupation' combobox that is not present on the current page. Visual evidence shows the form instead contains 'Age Group' radio buttons. This indicates a UI change or a dynamic form version that has invalidated the cached DETERMINISTIC instructions.
observedIndicators: Stale cache detected in DETERMINISTIC mode
Visual mismatch: Automation attempted to click 'Select your occupation' but screenshot shows 'Age Group' radio buttons
Tool call 'click' failed with 'Unable to resolve HTML element' while using cached selectors
High historical flakiness (0.77) and mixed pass rate (0.63) suggesting dynamic page content
Semantic intent 'Fill out all survey questions' is flexible and likely to recover with a fresh autonomous run

remediationSteps.summary: Retry with cleared AI cache to allow adaptation to dynamic UI.
remediationSteps.details: Clear the PageAI cache and retry the test. This will force the agent to re-analyze the page in autonomous mode and adapt to the 'Age Group' fields.

remediationSteps.summary: Evaluate the need for non-deterministic execution for this specific survey.
remediationSteps.details: If the survey field rotation is a permanent feature of the site, consider running this test in a non-deterministic mode or adding logic to handle different field sets if the AI struggles.

plan.notes: The 'unstable-survey' name and high flakiness score (0.77) suggest the website intentionally rotates form fields. Because the overall objective is flexible ('Fill out all survey questions'), clearing the cache will allow the AI to adapt to the current form structure.
